title: Digimon Two World Conspiracy
body:
Discord: https://discord.gg/CgjmZHkesA

(8gb, 8000mb ram allocation recommmended)

Welcome to Digimon Two World Conspiracy!

The world is vast and full of perils, and civilization is sparse and spread thin. Work with fellow Tamers and your Digimon Partners to reconnect the people of this world!

Digimon Two World Conspiracy is a modpack centered on exploration, creation, survival, civilization, and of course, Digimon!

There are waystones and vehicles you can build, from boats to airships to help you get around. Careful, though! The world is dangerous and unforgiving, and between the spread out towns, cities, and outposts await dangerous monsters, ill-meaning Pillagers, ominous ruins, ships full of violent raiders, and more.

You’re not alone, though! You’ll spawn with your very own Digimon partner, along with a bag full of gear and a handful of meat to help you start raising it. In its current state, it might not seem like much. But if you raise your Digimon well with care and dedication, it will take much more than a few Pillagers to take you down!

And you’re not the only Tamer out there. Work together using ships to carry people and goods across vast oceans, or connect the various outposts, bases, and towns on the scattered continents by building a train and a network of railways.

This world is what you make of it, Tamer. So, what will you make of it?

(Includes https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked for customizing your look)
